blogs.title: Data, Deciphered: Why I’m Building a Bridge Between Business Analysis and AI
blogs.snippet: IntroductionHello there. Welcome to my very first blog post. The way the work of a Business Analyst has evolved is now beyond simply taking the requir...
blogs.content:
Introduction

Hello there. Welcome to my very first blog post. The way the work of a Business Analyst has evolved is now beyond simply taking the requirements to creating scalable data-driven solutions. That's been my realization as I go forward in my journey of entering the workplace as well as pursuing higher education in business analytics and strategic management regarding the tools I've used have never changed at such a fast pace.


Vision: Why This Blog?

I'd like to create a resource location where business logic converges with technical execution. I'm convinced that the future of business isn't solely based upon having data—it's how quickly we can take that data and turn it into action.

In this format, I will delve deeper into:

Core Analytics: Excel, SQL & Power BI and other core analytics fundamentals to create strong reporting frameworks.

The AI Frontiers: How machine learning & AI agents will automate workflow by turning what were once manual tasks, into automated and intelligent processes.

Modern Technology Frameworks: Building functional prototype systems using technologies including React, Vite & Supabase to solve real-world sales and production problems.

Strategic Growth: How Business Intelligence (BI) can be a strategic tool for achieving corporate growth.


What's Next?

This is far from being simply a portfolio; it is a promise to continue learning. Whether it is helping someone troubleshoot their DAX formula in Power BI, whether I am designing an ERP module within Odoo, or whether I am investigating the latest developments in Large Language Models (LLMs), I would like to share these "Aha!" moments with you.

As I move forward, my focus continues to be on automation of the mundane and allowing us to focus on the meaningful. I am also excited to provide a venue for your participation as I begin my exploration of the intersection of technology and business strategy.
